value.found_quote: Agent observability refers to the methods for gaining insights into the internal state and behavior of software agents, particularly AI-powered agents such as those built using Large Language Models (LLMs).
value.rationale: The page is Google Cloud's documentation on agent observability, describing methods for evals and observability of AI agents, including quality and evaluation via the Gen AI evaluation service. It also covers the challenges of agents that drift, hallucinate, and regress, matching the claim. The page presents this as a current Google Cloud Observability/Application Monitoring offering.
